table.noDataDescription: Create a new absence type to get started.

delete.title: Absence type deleted successfully
delete.description: The absence type has been deleted correctly
delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this absence type?

fields.name: Name
fields.isEmployeeRequestableDescription: Allows employees to select this absence type when requesting days off
fields.isTimeBankCompensableDescription: Allows deducting days of this type from the employee's time bank

validation.codeRequired: Please enter the absence type code
validation.nameRequired: Please enter the absence type name

info.title: Information
info.description: Fill in all required fields to create or update an absence type. The integration code is optional and can be used to link with external systems.

toast.updateSuccessDescription: The absence type has been updated correctly
toast.createSuccessDescription: The absence type has been created correctly

excel.title: Instructions:
excel.step1: Download the Excel template to see the required format
excel.step2: Fill in the absence types information in the template
excel.step3: Make sure all required fields (Code and Name) are filled in
excel.step5: Verify the information and press Process

manual.title: Instructions for manual entry:
manual.step1: Click Add Row to add a new absence type
manual.step2: Fill in the required fields in each row
manual.step3: You can add as many rows as needed
manual.step4: Verify the information and press Process

table.noDataDescription: Add absence types manually or upload an Excel file

validation.error: Please select a valid classification from the list

warnings.invalidClassifications: {count} classification(s) from Excel are not valid and have been replaced with "JUSTIFIED_ABSENCE". Please select valid classifications.
warnings.title: Warning

incompleteFields.title: Error
incompleteFields.description: Cannot process: There are absence types with incomplete fields. Please complete all fields before continuing.

noData.title: Warning
noData.description: No absence types to process. Add at least one absence type.

processCompletedWithErrors.title: Process completed with errors
processCompletedWithErrors.description: Review the table for more details.

processCompletedSuccess.title: Process completed
processCompletedSuccess.description: Absence types have been processed correctly

tooltips.incompleteFields: There are absence types with incomplete fields. Complete all fields before processing.
tooltips.noData: Add at least one absence type to process.
